chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-124 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2026. Mr. Mukesh Kumar Oad, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant Prosecutor General for the State alongwith SIP / SHO Bashir Ahmed Chandio and ASI Muhammad Nawaz Magsi from PS Mari Jalbani. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ***************************************** SHO PS Mari Jalbani present in Court submits that in the instant matter four accused are nominated out of which one accused Riaz Rustamani has already been arrested, while another accused namely Manthar s/o Bharo Rustamani has been arrested and produced before the learned Trial Court by him. He further submits that the efforts are also being taken for arrest of remaining two absconding accused and to produce before the learned Trial Court. At this juncture, learned counsel for Petitioner expresses his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the Petition. In view of above, the instant Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application(s), if any. However, the learned Trial Court is directed to take all possible efforts for arrest of absconding accused. Let a copy of this order be communicated with concerned learned Trial Court for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
